name: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source
notes: Reports authentication failures on the same source IP address with different usernames more than 10 times within 5 minutes.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source
Event description: Detected authentication failures on the same source IP address with different user names more than 10 times in 5 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
